# hetzner_rdns_list (Data Source)

Lists all rDNS entries, optionally filtered by server IP.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `server_ip` (String) Filter by server main IP address. If omitted, returns all rDNS entries.

### Read-Only

- `entries` (Attributes List) List of rDNS entries. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--entries))

<a id="nestedatt--entries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `entries`

Read-Only:

- `ip` (String) IP address.
- `ptr` (String) PTR record value.
